# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  linkerd-config.yml: |-
    admin:
      accessLogLevel: info
    proxy:
      proxyImage: buoyantio/linkerd-proxy:2.10.2
      logLevel: info
    telemetry:
      namespace: linkerd

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller
  namespace: linkerd

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: linkerd-controller
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: linkerd-controller
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: linkerd-controller
      containers:
        - name: controller
          image: buoyantio/linkerd-controller:2.10.2
          command:
            - "/destination"
            - "-addr=:8089"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: linkerd-config
              mountPath: "/io.buoyant/linkerd-config"
      volumes:
        - name: linkerd-config
          configMap:
            name: linkerd-config

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller-api
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-controller
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8089

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: linkerd-proxy-injector
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: linkerd-proxy-injector
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: injector
          image: buoyantio/linkerd-proxy-injector:2.10.2

---

apiVersion: authorization.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  trustDomain: linkerd.cluster.local

---

apiVersion: authorization.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ExternalServicePolicy
metadata:
  name: my-external-svc
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  issuer: name
  validUntil: "2021-09-20T23:40:00Z"
  rules:
    - method: GET
      path:
        contains:
          regex: /secrets/.*
